use_cases.title: Perfect for Every Project
use_cases.subtitle: Whether you're building a startup, launching a side project, or redesigning your brand, Logo.surf has you covered
use_cases.startup_desc: Create professional branding on a budget. Generate logos and favicons quickly for MVPs, landing pages, and pitch decks without hiring expensive designers.
use_cases.developers_desc: Perfect for developers who need quick favicons for projects, prototypes, or client work. Generate consistent branding assets in minutes.
use_cases.small_business_desc: Establish your online presence with professional logos and favicons. Perfect for local businesses, e-commerce stores, and service providers.
use_cases.content_creators_desc: Stand out on social media, YouTube, and blogs with custom logos. Create consistent branding across all your digital platforms.
use_cases.agencies_desc: Deliver quick branding solutions to clients. Generate multiple logo concepts and favicon sets for presentations and client approval.
use_cases.educators_desc: Create logos for school projects, educational websites, or academic presentations. Perfect for learning design principles and branding basics.

how_it_works.title: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Create professional logos and favicons in just three simple steps
how_it_works.step1_desc: Type your brand name, company name, or any text you want to convert into a logo. Emojis and special characters are supported.
how_it_works.step2_desc: Choose from various fonts, adjust colors, set background styles, and fine-tune the positioning to match your brand perfectly.
how_it_works.step3_desc: Get your logo in multiple formats (PNG, SVG) and complete favicon packages for all devices and browsers in one click.

benefits.title: Why Choose Logo.surf
benefits.no_signup_desc: Start creating immediately without creating accounts or providing personal information. Your privacy is protected.
benefits.unlimited_use_desc: Generate and download as many logos and favicons as you need. No limits, no restrictions, completely free.
benefits.commercial_use_desc: Use your generated logos and favicons for any commercial purpose. Perfect for businesses, startups, and client projects.
benefits.instant_results_desc: No waiting, no processing time. See your logo preview in real-time and download immediately when satisfied.
benefits.all_formats_desc: Get everything you need: PNG logos in multiple sizes, SVG vectors, and complete favicon packages for all browsers.
benefits.web_based_desc: No software installation required. Works on any device with a web browser - desktop, tablet, or mobile.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.what_is_logosurf_answer: Logo.surf is a free online tool that converts text into professional logos and favicons. Simply enter your text, customize the design, and download your files instantly.
faq.ai_answer: Currently, Logo.surf does not use AI. It's a straightforward text-to-logo converter that gives you full control over the design elements like fonts, colors, and sizing.
faq.what_is_favicon_answer: A favicon is a small icon that appears in browser tabs, bookmarks, and search results to represent your website. It helps users identify your site at a glance.
faq.font_copyright_answer: It's important to check the licensing terms of any font you use. The fonts provided in this tool are web-safe fonts that are generally free for commercial use, but always verify the license for your specific use case.
faq.supported_characters: What types of characters are supported?
faq.supported_characters_answer: Our favicon generator supports UTF-8 characters, including letters, numbers, symbols, and emojis. However, complex characters or emojis may render differently across devices.
faq.why_different_sizes: Why do I need different favicon sizes?
faq.why_different_sizes_answer: Different devices and platforms require different favicon sizes. For example, iOS needs 180x180 for home screen icons, while browser tabs typically use 16x16 or 32x32 pixels.
faq.how_to_add: How do I add the favicon to my website?
faq.how_to_add_answer: Copy the HTML code provided and paste it in the <head> section of your website. Make sure to upload the favicon files to your website's root directory or the path specified in the HTML.
